format_map.DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32B32_FLOAT: MTLPixelFormatInvalid (no RGB32 in Metal, pad to RGBA32)

Reset.notes: Reset allocator for reuse. DXMT resets its internal command pool. Metal command buffers are one-shot (create, commit, done). Recycling is custom.
Reset.translation: reset internal command buffer pool / ring allocator

CopyTileMappings.notes: Copy tile mapping from one reserved resource to another.

ExecuteCommandLists.notes: Core execution. DXMT records D3D12 commands into its own command buffer format, then replays them into MTLCommandBuffers. Each D3D12 command list becomes one or more MTLCommandBuffers.
ExecuteCommandLists.translation: for each cmdList: create MTLCommandBuffer, replay recorded commands, commit()

GetClockCalibration.notes: CPU/GPU timestamp correlation. Maps to device->sampleTimestamps(&cpu, &gpu).

GetTimestampFrequency.notes: Query GPU timestamp frequency. Metal exposes through counter sets.
GetTimestampFrequency.translation: query counter set info for timestamp frequency

Signal.notes: GPU signal. Maps to commandBuffer->encodeSignalEvent(event, value).

UpdateTileMappings.notes: Sparse texture tile mapping. Metal sparse texture API.

Wait.notes: GPU wait. Maps to commandBuffer->encodeWaitForEvent(event, value).

ID3D12DescriptorHeap.concrete_objc: (no direct Metal equivalent - custom descriptor array)

_internal_GetCPUDescriptorHandle.notes: Returns CPU-visible handle into descriptor array. DXMT implements as array entry index.

_internal_GetGPUDescriptorHandle.notes: Returns GPU-visible handle. DXMT maps to GPU address of backing buffer or direct resource reference.

CheckFeatureSupport.notes: No direct equivalent. Feature queries translated to reading MTLDevice capabilities: GPU family, feature set, texture support, etc.

CopyDescriptors.notes: Copy between descriptor heap ranges. DXMT implements as memcpy of descriptor structs.
CopyDescriptors.translation: memcpy descriptor entries between heap slots

CopyDescriptorsSimple.notes: Same as CopyDescriptors but simpler. memcpy.

CreateCommandAllocator.notes: D3D12 command allocators have no direct Metal equivalent. DXMT implements its own command pool/buffer recycling. Metal 4 adds MTL4CommandAllocator.
CreateCommandAllocator.translation: custom allocator pool (DXMT: ring buffer allocator)

CreateCommandList.notes: D3D12 immediate/deferred command lists map to MTLCommandBuffer. DXMT uses a deferred recording model that replays into Metal command buffers. Metal 4 adds explicit begin/end.

CreateCommandQueue.notes: D3D12 queue type maps: DIRECT->MTLCommandQueue, COMPUTE->MTLCommandQueue, COPY->MTLCommandQueue (Blit). DXMT wraps in MTLD3D12CommandQueue.

CreateCommandSignature.notes: Command signatures define the layout for ExecuteIndirect. Maps to custom indirect argument encoding. Metal has MTLIndirectCommandBuffer for similar functionality.
CreateCommandSignature.translation: parse signature -> build indirect argument layout for MTLIndirectCommandBuffer or custom encoding

CreateCommittedResource.notes: Committed = explicit heap. Maps to newBuffer/newTexture directly, or newHeap then sub-allocate. D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_DEFAULT -> private GPU memory, UPLOAD -> shared/managed, READBACK -> shared.

CreateComputePipelineState.notes: Direct mapping. CS -> MTLComputePipelineState with computeFunction.

CreateConstantBufferView.notes: CBVs in Metal are just buffer+offset. DXMT stores GPU address in descriptor heap slot.
CreateConstantBufferView.translation: store gpu_address + size in descriptor slot

CreateDepthStencilView.metal: N/A (implicit via MTLTexture with pixelFormat depth/stencil in render pass)
CreateDepthStencilView.notes: DSVs map to depth attachment in MTLRenderPassDescriptor. Stencil-only DSV maps to stencil aspect.
CreateDepthStencilView.translation: store MTLTexture ref + slice/level for depth attachment

CreateDescriptorHeap.notes: Metal has no descriptor heap concept. DXMT implements descriptor heaps as CPU-side arrays that map to Metal buffer bindings at draw/dispatch time. CBV_SRV_UAV heaps -> buffer/texture binding arrays. SAMPER heaps -> MTLSamplerState arrays.
CreateDescriptorHeap.translation: custom descriptor heap (CPU-side allocation, GPU binding at draw time)

CreateFence.notes: D3D12 fence (GPU-CPU sync with value) maps to MTLSharedEvent (if cross-process needed) or MTLEvent. MTLSharedEvent has signalValue / waitUntilScheduledValue. MTLFence is for command buffer ordering only.
CreateFence.translation: device->newSharedEvent() for cross-process, device->newEvent() for in-process

CreateGraphicsPipelineState.notes: D3D12 PSO maps to MTLRenderPipelineState. Shader bytecode (DXIL) must be transpiled to MSL via airconv. VS->vertexFunction, PS->fragmentFunction, GS/HS/DS/MS->mesh/object functions. Blend state, rasterizer state, depth stencil all map to pipeline descriptor fields.

CreateHeap.notes: Maps to MTLHeap. D3D12 heaps -> MTLHeap with sub-allocation via newBufferWithLength/newTextureWithDescriptor on the heap.

CreatePipelineLibrary.notes: Pipeline libraries store compiled PSOs for reuse. Metal has MTLBinaryArchive for pipeline caching and MTLDynamicLibrary for shader code sharing.

CreatePipelineState.notes: Device2 added stream-based PSO creation. Same Metal calls as CreateGraphics/ComputePipelineState.
CreatePipelineState.translation: same as CreateGraphics/ComputePipelineState but from stream desc

CreatePlacedResource.notes: Placed resources are sub-allocated from a heap at an offset. Maps to MTLHeap sub-allocation. Alignment and offset mapping required.
CreatePlacedResource.translation: heap->newBufferWithLength(length, options, offset) or heap->newTextureWithDescriptor(texDesc, offset)

CreateQueryHeap.metal: MTLDevice::newCounterSampleBufferWithDescriptor (for timestamp) / custom query buffer (for occlusion/pipeline stats)
CreateQueryHeap.notes: D3D12 query types: TIMESTAMP->MTLCounterSampleBuffer, OCCLUSION->MTLRenderPassVisibilityResultBuffer, PIPELINE_STATISTICS->custom buffer. Metal doesn't have pipeline statistics natively.
CreateQueryHeap.translation: device->newCounterSampleBufferWithDescriptor(desc) for timestamps, custom buffer for occlusion

CreateRenderTargetView.metal: N/A (implicit via MTLTexture slice/level in render pass descriptor)
CreateRenderTargetView.notes: RTVs map to MTLTexture attachments in MTLRenderPassDescriptor. May need texture view for format reinterpretation.
CreateRenderTargetView.translation: store MTLTexture ref + slice/level for render pass attachment

CreateReservedResource.metal: MTLDevice::newTextureWithDescriptor (with MTLTextureUsageSparseBinding if available) / sparse tile management
CreateReservedResource.notes: Tiled/reserved resources map to Metal sparse textures (MTLDevice supportsSparseTextures). Tile mapping via MTLResourceStateCommandEncoder or MTLBlitCommandEncoder updateSparseMappings. Not all Metal GPUs support sparse.

CreateRootSignature.notes: Root signatures define the binding layout. Metal uses argument encoders (MTL3) or argument tables (MTL4). DXMT parses root signature bytecode and builds its own binding layout that maps root parameters to Metal buffer/texture/sampler slots.
CreateRootSignature.translation: parse bytecode -> build binding layout -> MTLArgumentEncoder or direct setBuffer/setTexture

CreateSampler.notes: Direct mapping. D3D12_SAMPLER_DESC -> MTLSamplerDescriptor. Address modes, filter, LOD, comparison, border color all map. Anisotropy maps. D3D12 border color is more limited.

CreateShaderResourceView.metal: N/A (implicit via MTLTexture / MTLBuffer + pixel format)
CreateShaderResourceView.notes: SRVs map to MTLTexture (for texture SRVs) or MTLBuffer (for buffer SRVs). Format conversion may require creating a texture view with different pixel format. Raw buffers map to buffer+offset.
CreateShaderResourceView.translation: create MTLTextureView or store buffer+offset+format in descriptor

CreateSharedHandle.notes: Cross-process sharing. MTLSharedTextureHandle for textures, MTLSharedEvent for fences. D3D12 handles map to Mach ports on macOS.

CreateUnorderedAccessView.metal: N/A (implicit via MTLTexture with usageShaderWrite / MTLBuffer)
CreateUnorderedAccessView.notes: UAVs map to MTLTexture with usageShaderWrite or MTLBuffer. Atomic UAVs use MTLBuffer with atomic access. Counter UAVs need append/consume emulation.
CreateUnorderedAccessView.translation: create MTLTexture with usageShaderWrite or buffer+offset+atomic_flag

Evict.notes: Remove from residency set. See MakeResident.

GetCopyableFootprints.notes: Computes layout for texture copy operations. Must be reimplemented based on Metal texture layout rules. Row pitch, slice pitch, offset calculations.
GetCopyableFootprints.translation: custom footprint calculation matching D3D12 layout

GetDescriptorHandleIncrementSize.notes: Returns sizeof(descriptor) for D3D12. In DXMT: fixed sizes per heap type.
GetDescriptorHandleIncrementSize.translation: return fixed size (e.g., 64 for CBV_SRV_UAV, 256 for sampler)

GetDeviceRemovedReason.notes: Metal doesn't expose device removal. Return S_OK unless device is actually lost.
GetDeviceRemovedReason.translation: return S_OK (Metal doesn't expose device removal)

GetResourceTiling.notes: Query sparse texture tile info. Maps to Metal sparse texture queries.

MakeResident.notes: Metal resources are resident by default. MTLResidencySet (macOS 13+) allows explicit management. Most implementations are no-ops or use MTLResidencySet.

OpenSharedHandleByName.metal: N/A (no named shared resources in Metal)
OpenSharedHandleByName.notes: Metal doesn't have named shared resources. Requires custom named handle registry.
OpenSharedHandleByName.translation: custom named handle registry over Mach ports

SetEventOnMultipleFenceCompletion.notes: Multiple fence completion notification. Maps to MTLSharedEvent listener.

SetStablePowerState.notes: Developer-only D3D12 feature. No Metal equivalent. Return S_OK.

GetCompletedValue.notes: Direct mapping. Returns current signaled value.

SetEventOnCompletion.notes: CPU wait for GPU fence value. Maps to shared event listener notification.

AtomicCopyBufferUINT.notes: Atomic buffer copy. Metal has atomic buffer operations in compute shaders.
AtomicCopyBufferUINT.translation: dispatch compute shader with atomic operations

AtomicCopyBufferUINT64.translation: dispatch compute shader with 64-bit atomic operations

BeginQuery.notes: Occlusion queries map to visibility result. TIMESTAMP queries use MTLCounterSampleBuffer. Begin/End maps to setVisibilityResultMode(MTLVisibilityResultModeCounting, offset).

ClearDepthStencilView.notes: Metal clears happen as loadAction=MTLLoadActionClear on render pass attachment. Requires starting a clear-only render pass, OR using blit encoder if available.
ClearDepthStencilView.translation: MTLLoadActionClear on depth attachment in render pass

ClearRenderTargetView.notes: Same as DSV clear. Use MTLLoadActionClear on color attachment.
ClearRenderTargetView.translation: MTLLoadActionClear on color attachment in render pass

ClearState.notes: Metal has no explicit clear-state. Must end current encoder, start fresh.
ClearState.translation: end current encoder, reset all bindings, start new encoder

ClearUnorderedAccessViewFloat.notes: Same as Uint version but with float values.
ClearUnorderedAccessViewFloat.translation: dispatch compute shader to write float clear value to UAV

ClearUnorderedAccessViewUint.notes: Metal has no native UAV clear. Must dispatch a compute shader that writes the clear value. DXMT implements this with a built-in clear shader.
ClearUnorderedAccessViewUint.translation: dispatch compute shader to write clear value to UAV

Close.notes: End current encoder. DXMT tracks recording state.

CopyBufferRegion.notes: Direct mapping. Must open blit encoder if not already active.

CopyResource.notes: Full resource copy. Texture->texture or buffer->buffer.

CopyTextureRegion.notes: Maps to Metal texture copy. Must handle subresource index -> slice+level conversion. Format conversion copies may need compute shader.
CopyTextureRegion.translation: blitEncoder->copyFromTexture(src, srcSlice, srcLevel, srcOrigin, srcSize, dst, dstSlice, dstLevel, dstOrigin)

CopyTiles.notes: Sparse resource tile copy. Complex mapping.
CopyTiles.translation: sparse tile copy via blit encoder

DiscardResource.notes: Setting loadAction to MTLLoadActionDontCare discards previous contents.
DiscardResource.translation: use MTLLoadActionDontCare on attachment or blit encoder discard

Dispatch.notes: Direct mapping. D3D12 thread group count -> MTLSize threadgroupCount. Thread group size from PSO.

DrawIndexedInstanced.notes: Index buffer -> MTLBuffer with indexType (uint16/uint32). baseVertex and baseInstance map directly.
DrawIndexedInstanced.translation: renderEncoder->drawIndexedPrimitives(primitiveType, indexCount, indexType, indexBuffer, indexBufferOffset, instanceCount, baseVertex, baseInstance)

DrawInstanced.notes: D3D12 topology -> MTLPrimitiveType conversion. instance_count maps directly. base_instance maps to startInstance.

EndQuery.notes: End visibility counting for occlusion queries.

ExecuteBundle.metal: Replay recorded bundle commands into current encoder
ExecuteBundle.notes: No direct Metal equivalent. DXMT bundles are pre-recorded command arrays that get replayed.
ExecuteBundle.translation: replay bundle commands into current Metal encoder

ExecuteIndirect.notes: D3D12 command signature -> Metal indirect draw/dispatch. DXMT parses the signature and either maps to Metal indirect commands or emulates with CPU-side argument parsing.

IASetIndexBuffer.notes: Store index buffer ref. Used at drawIndexedPrimitives time. DXGI_FORMAT_R16_UINT -> MTLIndexTypeUInt16, R32 -> MTLIndexTypeUInt32.
IASetIndexBuffer.translation: store index buffer + offset + format for next drawIndexedPrimitives call

IASetPrimitiveTopology.metal: Store for use at draw time (MTLPrimitiveType)
IASetPrimitiveTopology.notes: D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY -> MTLPrimitiveType. POINTLIST->MTLPrimitiveTypePoint, TRIANGLELIST->MTLPrimitiveTypeTriangle, etc. Strip topologies need restart index handling.
IASetPrimitiveTopology.translation: store topology -> convert to MTLPrimitiveType at drawPrimitives/drawIndexedPrimitives

IASetVertexBuffers.notes: Direct mapping. D3D12 slot -> Metal buffer index (typically start at 30 to avoid shader arguments).
IASetVertexBuffers.translation: renderEncoder->setVertexBuffer(buffer, offset, startIndex + i) for each buffer

OMSetDepthBounds.notes: Direct mapping if MTLDevice supports depth bounds test.

OMSetRenderTargets.notes: Must create/recreate render pass descriptor with the specified attachments. Up to 8 RTVs + 1 DSV. Metal requires ending/starting a new render pass when targets change.
OMSetRenderTargets.translation: build MTLRenderPassDescriptor with colorAttachments[i] and depthAttachment, start new render pass

OMSetStencilRef.notes: Direct mapping. D3D12 has single stencil ref -> Metal supports separate front/back.

RSSetViewports.notes: Direct mapping. D3D12 viewport -> MTLViewport. Metal only supports 1 viewport (no VP array without vertex amplification).

Reset.notes: Reset command list for reuse. Get new command buffer from allocator.

ResolveQueryData.metal: MTLBlitCommandEncoder::resolveCounters (Metal 4) / copy from visibility result buffer
ResolveQueryData.notes: Copy query results to a buffer. Occlusion results from visibility buffer, timestamps from counter sample buffer.
ResolveQueryData.translation: blitEncoder resolve or copy visibility result buffer to destination

ResolveSubresource.notes: MSAA resolve. Maps directly to Metal resolve operation.
ResolveSubresource.translation: blitEncoder->resolveTexture(src, slice, level, dst, slice, level)

ResolveSubresourceRegion.notes: Partial resolve. Metal supports region-based resolve.
ResolveSubresourceRegion.translation: blitEncoder->resolveTexture(src, srcSlice, srcLevel, srcOrigin, srcSize, dst, dstSlice, dstLevel, dstOrigin)

ResourceBarrier.notes: CRITICAL: Metal has implicit resource barriers within a command buffer. D3D12 UAV barriers need MTLFence or memory barrier. Metal 4 adds explicit barriers via MTL4RenderCommandEncoder::barrier. DXMT currently relies on implicit barriers + careful command buffer splitting.
ResourceBarrier.translation: mostly no-op (implicit), UAV barriers need MTLFence/barrier, texture layout transitions need render pass splits

SOSetTargets.metal: N/A (no stream output in Metal) / compute emulation
SOSetTargets.notes: Metal has no stream output. Must be emulated via transform feedback or compute shader. Most DXMT implementations return NOT_IMPLEMENTED.
SOSetTargets.translation: not supported (Metal has no SO) / compute emulation

SetComputeRoot32BitConstant.notes: Root constant. Maps to setBytes with the constant value at the appropriate offset in the push constant buffer.

SetComputeRoot32BitConstants.notes: Array of root constants. setBytes with the array.

SetComputeRootConstantBufferView.notes: Root CBV. GPU virtual address -> MTLBuffer + offset.

SetComputeRootDescriptorTable.notes: Root descriptor table points into descriptor heap. DXMT reads descriptors from heap at the given offset and binds the corresponding Metal resources.

SetComputeRootShaderResourceView.notes: Root SRV. Texture SRV -> setTexture, Buffer SRV -> setBuffer.
SetComputeRootShaderResourceView.translation: computeEncoder->setTexture(texture, slice, level, slotIndex) or setBuffer

SetComputeRootSignature.notes: Maps root signature layout to Metal buffer/texture/sampler bindings. Root constants -> push constants (setBytes). Root descriptors -> setBuffer/setTexture. Descriptor tables -> offset into bound descriptor heap buffer.
SetComputeRootSignature.translation: apply binding layout: setBytes for root constants, setBuffer/setTexture for root descriptors

SetComputeRootUnorderedAccessView.notes: Root UAV. Texture UAV -> setTexture (usageShaderWrite), Buffer UAV -> setBuffer.
SetComputeRootUnorderedAccessView.translation: computeEncoder->setTexture(texture, slotIndex) or setBuffer(buffer, offset, slotIndex)

SetDescriptorHeaps.notes: Select which descriptor heaps are visible. DXMT stores reference for subsequent root signature binding.
SetDescriptorHeaps.translation: store heap references for later binding resolution

SetGraphicsRootDescriptorTable.notes: Same as compute version but for render encoder.
SetGraphicsRootDescriptorTable.translation: same as compute version for render encoder

SetGraphicsRootShaderResourceView.translation: same as compute for render encoder

SetGraphicsRootSignature.notes: Same as SetComputeRootSignature but for render pipeline.
SetGraphicsRootSignature.translation: same as SetComputeRootSignature for render encoder

SetGraphicsRootUnorderedAccessView.translation: same as compute for render encoder

SetPipelineState.notes: Bind pre-compiled pipeline. DXMT stores MTLRenderPipelineState or MTLComputePipelineState in its PSO wrapper.

SetPredication.notes: Metal has no native predication. Can be emulated with conditional dispatch or by checking the predicate value in a compute shader.
SetPredication.translation: emulate with conditional logic or indirect draw/dispatch with count=0

SetViewInstanceMask.notes: View instance mask -> Metal vertex amplification with view mask.

WriteBufferImmediate.notes: Write immediate values to buffer. Can use fillBuffer for zeros or compute shader for arbitrary values.
WriteBufferImmediate.translation: blitEncoder->fillBuffer(buffer, range, value) or compute shader

GetCachedBlob.notes: Return cached pipeline data. Metal uses binary archives for caching.

GetGPUVirtualAddress.notes: Returns GPU-addressable pointer. Metal buffers have gpuAddress. DXMT maintains its own GPU address space for resource lookup.

GetHeapProperties.notes: Query which heap and type. Maps to Metal heap properties.
GetHeapProperties.translation: return stored heap type and CPU page property

Map.notes: CPU access to GPU buffer. Shared buffers -> contents() directly. Managed buffers -> contents() + didModifyRange. Private buffers -> must use blit encoder to copy from staging.
Map.translation: buffer->contents() for shared/managed, staging buffer copy for private

ReadFromSubresource.notes: CPU read from texture. Maps to getBytes for readable textures or blit copy to staging.
ReadFromSubresource.translation: texture->getBytes(bytes, bytesPerRow, bytesPerImage, region, slice, level)

Unmap.notes: Flush CPU writes. Managed buffers need didModifyRange. Shared buffers are coherent.
Unmap.translation: buffer->didModifyRange(range) for managed, no-op for shared

WriteToSubresource.notes: CPU write to texture subresource. Maps to replaceRegion for staging or blit copy.
WriteToSubresource.translation: texture->replaceRegion(region, slice, level, pixels, bytesPerRow, bytesPerImage)

ID3D12RootSignature.concrete_objc: (no direct Metal equivalent - custom binding layout)

_internal_ParseRootSignature.metal: Build MTLArgumentEncoder layout or argument table bindings
_internal_ParseRootSignature.notes: Root signature bytecode is parsed into a binding layout. Root constants -> setBytes, root descriptors -> setBuffer/setTexture, descriptor tables -> offset into heap buffer. MTL4 uses argument tables for explicit binding.
_internal_ParseRootSignature.translation: parse bytecode -> build binding layout -> argument encoder or direct binding slots

GetBuffer.notes: Get back buffer at index. DXMT maintains a texture array.

Present.notes: Present frame. Maps to drawable->present(). VSync via CAMetalLayer.displaySyncEnabled.

ResizeBuffers.notes: Resize back buffers. Metal: recreate textures matching new size.
ResizeBuffers.translation: recreate MTLTexture array with new dimensions

evidence.note: Generated from DXMT source analysis and macOS Metal SDK headers.
